title: Pandan Sweet Fritters
description: A Malaysian-inspired dessert featuring crispy fritters filled with sweet pandan custard. Serve warm and enjoy!
instructions: Combine pandan leaves, coconut milk, and 1/4 cup sugar in a blender. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour, remaining sugar, eggs, and salt.
Add the blended pandan mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Drain on paper towels and serve warm.
Serve with a side of sweet coconut milk or syrup, if desired.
